title: I made up a word : Anthropomereological
author: joshualinog
excerpt: Combination of anthropological or even just the prefix **anthropo**- (circa anthropomorphic)
body:
Combination of anthropological or even just the prefix **anthropo**- (circa anthropomorphic)

**AND**

The word **mereological** from mereology
content:
